highlights_html: Get fast, 100% online access to a personalized 4‑week GLP‑1 weight loss program with tirzepatide + Glycine or semaglutide, including a virtual medical consult, ongoing licensed provider support, and one flat monthly price with no increases for dose changes.
highlights_text: Get fast, 100% online access to a personalized 4‑week GLP‑1 weight loss program with tirzepatide + Glycine or semaglutide, including a virtual medical consult, ongoing licensed provider support, and one flat monthly price with no increases for dose changes.
about_deal_html:
⚠️ Important: Limit One Voucher Per Person

Limit one voucher per person, regardless of the number of Groupon accounts or email addresses used. Vouchers purchased using multiple accounts, emails, or names for the same individual will not be honored, and duplicate vouchers will be rejected at redemption.

BMI & Eligibility

BMI Requirements: A BMI of 25 or higher is required for new patients, or 20 or higher for existing patients continuing therapy. Patients enter their height, weight, and medical history during intake to confirm eligibility.

Medical Disqualifications: Patients may not be eligible for this program if they have a history of:

  • Gastric bypass or bariatric surgery
  • Known allergy or hypersensitivity to tirzepatide, glycine, or any inactive ingredients
  • Personal or family history of medullary thyroid carcinoma (MTC) or Multiple Endocrine Neoplasia syndrome type 2 (MEN 2)
  • Pancreatitis, severe gastrointestinal disease, or other conditions identified by the provider

A full allergy and medical history review is conducted during intake.

Steps to Redeem

  1. Open your voucher in the Groupon mobile app or print it out. Copy the voucher code (look for redemption code when you hit "view voucher" button — different than Groupon Code, example: VS-13PJ-W19J-F9GC-J1G2 — do not use, will not work).
  2. Complete the intake form for your purchased option: Semaglutide Intake Form or Tirzepatide Intake Form.
  3. Fill out the medical questionnaire (takes about 3–5 minutes).
  4. Enter your voucher code (look for redemption code when you hit "view voucher" button — different than Groupon Code, example: VS-13PJ-W19J-F9GC-J1G2 — do not use, will not work) in the Discount Code box and click Apply.
  5. Add your shipping address and credit card details for future renewals.
  6. After submission, you'll receive confirmation, and if approved, we will write a prescription within approximately 12 hours.
  7. You're all set!

Highlights

  • Choice of Tirzepatide or Semaglutide

  • Same low monthly price for all dosages

  • No monthly membership or app fees

  • 2-Day express shipping in secure, discreet packaging

  • Average 20% reduction in body weight

  • 8 out of 10 users say it's more effective than anything they've tried before

  • Quick 3-minute online eligibility quiz

  • 100% online medical consultation with provider-guided care

  • Doctor support with a dedicated health concierge

  • Medication, injection supplies, and follow-up messaging included

  • Lab-tested for quality and patient safety

  • Optional monthly renewal after the first month at the same low price unless canceled

4-Week Tirzepatide + Glycine GLP-1 Weight Loss Program (with Consultation)

Includes an online provider visit, medical review, and a prescription for compounded Tirzepatide + Glycine, plus shipping.

Final medication, dosage, and treatment plan are determined by a licensed provider based on your intake and medical history. All approvals are at the sole discretion of the prescribing provider.

4-Week Semaglutide GLP-1 Weight Loss Program (with Consultation)

Includes an online provider visit, medical review, and a semaglutide prescription, plus shipping.

Final medication, dosage, and treatment plan are determined by a licensed provider based on your intake and medical history. All approvals are at the sole discretion of the prescribing provider.

How It Works

  1. Take the quick online eligibility quiz.
  2. Complete the intake and medical questionnaire.
  3. Provider reviews your information and issues a prescription if approved.
  4. Receive medication and supplies in 2-day express shipping.
  5. Optional monthly renewal with ongoing support and messaging from your health concierge.

Temperature & Storage Notice

This GLP-1 medication is formulated to stay stable during shipping, remaining effective for up to 56 days at temperatures up to 86°F (30°C), and can handle up to 3 days at 104°F (40°C). Once delivered, the vial should be refrigerated right away for long-term storage. Do not freeze or expose to direct sunlight.

Shipping Restrictions

We currently ship within the continental United States only. Shipping is not available to Puerto Rico, Guam, or other U.S. territories.

FAQs

How soon will I receive my prescription?

If approved, prescriptions are written within approximately 12 hours of submission.

Do I need a doctor's visit in person?

No, all consultations are 100% online with our licensed providers.

What if I experience side effects?

You can message your health concierge for guidance and support anytime.

Need Help?

For any questions or issues, reach out to Harrison@refills.com for assistance.
